title: ipomoea kituiensis var. massaiensis
intro: Ipomoea kituiensis var. massaiensis, also known as a type of morning glory, is a plant species native to East Africa. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever, and has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as providing relief from various respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, which are traditionally used by local communities for their perceived health benefits.
